TABLE.NAME: assignsubmission_genaiuse
TABLE.COMMENT: Stores the generative AI use statement for each submission

FIELD.NAME: assignment
FIELD.COMMENT: The assignment instance this submission relates to.

FIELD.NAME: aiused
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether AI was used: 0 = No AI, 1 = AI Used.

FIELD.NAME: aicontentdesc
FIELD.COMMENT: Description of content used in task from AI tools.

FIELD.NAME: aimodification
FIELD.COMMENT: How the AI output was modified.

FIELD.NAME: onedrivelink
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional OneDrive link to the student's final submission.

FIELD.NAME: tooluse
FIELD.COMMENT: Richtext description of generative AI tool use entered directly in the submission form.

KEY.NAME: primary
KEY.COMMENT: The unique id for this record.
